Customer Support Specialist

Acme Corp is hiring a Customer Support Specialist to help manage our inbound support queue and keep customer satisfaction high across every channel.

Responsibilities

Triage and resolve tickets from the inbound support queue within SLA. Escalate complex issues to engineering. Maintain our help-center documentation.

Requirements

2+ years of experience in a customer-facing support role. Full-time, on-site or hybrid at our downtown office; remote candidates in the same time zone considered.

Benefits

Competitive salary. Benefits include health, dental, and paid time off. Acme Corp is an equal opportunity employer.

  • Support Team Lead
